titleStmt.title: Paris, Bibliothèque nationale de France, BnF Éthiopien d'Abbadie 105
Psalter and Horologium

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Mazmura Dāwit
msItem.incipit:
አርአያ፡ ፍካሬ፡ ዘጻድቃን፡ ወኃጥአን።
፩ብፁዕ፡ ብእሲ፡ ዘኢሖረ፡ በምክረ፡ ረሲዓን፨
ወኢቆመ፡ ውስተ፡ ፍኖተ፡ ኃጥአን፨
ወዘኢነበረ፡ ውስተ፡ መንበረ፡ መስተሳልቃን፨
msItem.explicit:
ወአንሰ፡ ነሣእኩ፡ ዘእምላዕሌሁ፡ ሰይፈ፨
ወመተርኩ፡ ርእሶ። ቃሉ፡ ፲፩።
ወአሰሰልኩ፡ ፅእለተ፡ እምደቂቀ፡ እስራኤል፨

title.hi: ዘሙሴ፡ ዘፀአት። ማኃልየ፡ ነቢያት፡ ወጸሎተ፡ ሙሴ።

msItem.incipit:
፩ንሴብሖ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ስቡሕ፡ ዘተሰብሐ፨
ፈረሰ፡ ወመስተጽዕነ፡ ወረወ፡ ውስተ፡ ባሕር፨
msItem.explicit:
እስመ፡ ርእያ፡ አዕይንትየ፡ አድኅኖተከ፨
ዘአስተዳሎከ፡ ቅድመ፡ ኵሉ፡ ሕዝብከ፨
ከመ፡ ትክሥት፡ ብርሃነ፡ ለአሕዛብ፨
ወክብረ፡ ለሕዝብከ፡ እስራኤል፨
ለቀዳማዊ፡ ፶ቃሉ፡ ፲፻፡ ወ፯፻፡ ፲ወ፱፡
ለካልእ፡ ፶፡ ቃሉ፡ ፲፻፡ ወ፯፻፡ ፷ወ፩።
ለሣልስ፡ ፶፡ቃሉ፡ ፲፻፡ ወ፯፻፡ ፷ወ፱።
ወመንፈቁ፡ ዘ፸ወ፯፡ መዝሙር፡ ኀበ፡ ይብል።
መርሖሙ፡ ማዕልተ፡ በደመና።
ወማኃልየ፡ ነቢያት፡ ህየ። ።

msItem.title: Song of Songsማኃልየ፡ መኃልይ፡ ዘውእቱ፡ ዘሰሎሞን፡ ንጉሥ።
msItem.incipit:
፩ይስዕመኒ፡ በስዕመተ፡ አፉሁ፨
አዳም፡ አጥባተኪ፡ እምወይን፨
msItem.explicit:
ጕይይ፡ አንተ፡ ወልደ፡ እኁየ፡ ወተመሰለ፡ ለወይጠል፨
ወእመ፡ አኮ፡ ከመ፡ ወሬዛ፡ ሀየል። ። ። ። ።

msItem.title: Daily prayers of the day and night hours
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ። አሐዱ፡ አምላክ፨ ንወጥን፡ በፈሪሀ፡ እግዚአብሔር፨ ሎቱ፡ ስብሐተ፡ በእንተ፡ ጽሒፈ፡ ሰዐታተ፡ ወጸሎታተ፡ ዘመዓልተ፡ ወለሊተ፡ ወውእቱ፡ ረዳኢነ፡ ምስለ፡ ገቢር፡ ለፈጽሞ፡ ዘነገሮ፡ መልአከ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ለአባ፡ እንጦንስ፡ ጸሎቱ፡ ተሀሎ፡ ምስሌነ፡ አሜን፨
msItem.explicit: ይስረይ፡ ኃጢአተነ፡ በብዝኃ፡ ምሕረቱ፡ ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ቅድስት፨፨፨

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ። አ ሐዱ፡ አምላክ፨ ወእምዝ፡ ንጽሕፍ፡ ውዳሴሃ፡ ለእግዚእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡ ተሰመይኪ፡ ፍቅርተ፡ ኦቡርክት፡ እምአንስት፡ አንቲ፡ ይእቲ፡ ዳግሚት፡ ቀመር፡ እንተ፡ ተሰመይኪ፡ ቅድስተ፡ ቅዱሳን። ዘውስቴታ፡ ጽላተ፡ ኪዳን፡
msItem.explicit: ኦእግዚእትነ፡ እሙ፡ ለዐቢይ፡ ወክቡር፡ አሐዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ ዘምሉእ፡ ሰማያ፡ ተ፡ ወምድር፡ ስብሐቲሁ፡ ሎቱ፡ ንገኒ፡ ወሎቱ፡ ነአምን፡ እምይእዜ፡ ወእስከ፡ ለዓለም፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፨ ሠረቀ፡ በሥጋ፡ እምድንግል፡ ዘእን

msItem.incipit: ወከዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ አቡሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኀኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ኀዋጺሃ፡ ለነፍስ፡ ወመፈውሰ፡ ሥጋ፡

ወከዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ አቡሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኀኒነ፡
ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ዘይሁብ፡ ፍኖተ፡ ባሕር፡ ወስተ፡ ባሕር፡

msItem.title: No item: LIT4711Mastabqwe, could not check for SupplicationRain2ጸሎት፡ በእንተ፡ ዝናማት፡
msItem.incipit: ወከዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ አቡሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኀኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ እግዚኦሙ፡ ወአምላኮሙ፡ ለማያት፡ ንስእለከ፡ ወናስተበቍዐከ፡ ከመ፡ ትፈኑ፡ ዝናመ፡

msItem.title: No item: LIT4711Mastabqwe, could not check for SupplicationHarvest2ጸሎት፡ በእንተ፡ ፍሬ፡ ምድር፡
msItem.incipit: ወከዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ አቡሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኀኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ በእንተ፡ ፍሬ፡ ምድር፡ ከመ፡ ፍሬሃ፡ ለምድር፡
ወከዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ አቡሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኀኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡፡ በእንተ፡ ማይተ፡ አፍላግ፡ ከመ፡ ያዕርግ፡ እስከ፡ መስፈርቶሙ፡
ወከዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ አቡሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኀኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ እግዚኦሙ፡ ለአጋዝት፡ ወንጉሦሙ፡ ለነገሥት።

msItem.title: No item: LIT4711Mastabqwe, could not check for SupplicationEnteringጸሎት፡ በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ያበውኡ፡ መባአ፡
msItem.incipit: ወከዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ አቡሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኀኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ያበውኡ፡ መባአ፡ ለቅድስት፡ አኃቲ፡ እንተ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ለክብረ፡ ስምከ፡

msItem.title: No item: LIT4711Mastabqwe, could not check for SupplicationCatechumensጸሎት፡ በእንተ፡ ንኡሰ፡ ክርስቲያን፡
msItem.incipit:
ወከዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ አቡሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኀኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ በእንተ፡ ንኡሰ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡
ከመ፡ ጸውዐ፡ እምጽልመት፡ ውስተ፡ ብርሃን፡

ወከዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ አ
ምላክነ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ አቡሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኀኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ አምላከ፡ መንፈስ፡ ወለኵሉ፡ ዘሥጋ፡ በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ኖሙ፡ አኃዊነ፡ ናስተበቍዐከ፡ ከመ፡ ያዕርፍ፡ ነፍሰ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ ውስተ፡ መካን፡ ስዑር፡

msItem.title: No item: LIT4711Mastabqwe, could not check for SupplicationCommunityጸሎት፡ በእንተ፡ ማኅበር፡
msItem.incipit: ወከዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ አቡሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኀኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ በእንተ፡ ማኅበር፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ከመ፡ ይትወከፍ፡ ለነ፡ ግብረ፡ ማኅበርነ፡ ንግበር፡

msItem.title: No item: LIT4711Mastabqwe, could not check for SupplicationPapasጸሎት፡ በእንተ፡ ጳጳስነ፡
msItem.incipit: ወከዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ አቡሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኀኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ በእንተ፡ ብፁዕ፡ ጳጳስነ፡ እገሌ፡ ከመ፡ ይትማኅፀኖ፡ ወይዕቀቦ፡

msItem.title: No item: LIT4711Mastabqwe, could not check for SupplicationPeaceጸሎት፡ በእንተ፡ ሰላም፡
msItem.incipit: ወከዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አኃዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ አቡሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኀኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ንጉሰ፡ ሰላም፡ በእንተ፡ ሰላም፡ ለቅድስት፡ አኃቲ፡ እንተ፡ ብኵላሃ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡

msItem.title: Further prayers and readings
msItem.incipit:
ካህን፡ ይብል፡ ሰብሐት፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ወሕዝብ፡ ይብሉ፡ ርትዕ። ለከ፡ እ
ግዚኦ፡ ለገባሬ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘኢያስቲርኢ፡ ንሰፍሕ፡ ነፍስነ፡ ወሰብሐተ፡፡ ዘነግህ፡ ንፈኑ፡ ለከ፡

msItem.title: Prayer of faithጸሎተ፡ ሃይማኖት፡
msItem.incipit:
ነአምን፡ በአብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ እምቅ
ድመ፡ ዓለም፡ ወመዋዕል፡ እምቅድመ፡ ጊዜ፡ ወሰዓት፡ ፡ ክርስቲያን፡

msItem.title: A treatise on computus
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ አሐዱ፡ አምላክ፡ ጸሐፍነ፡ በዘንዜክር፡ ሐሳበ፡ ርቱዕ፡ በ፲፩አበቅቴ፡ አም፲ወ፱፡ ለመስከረም፡ መጥቅዕ። በ፳ወ፪አበቅቴ፡ አመ፡ ፰ለጥቅምት፡ መጥቅዕ፡

msItem.title: King list D
msItem.incipit: ዝውእቱ፡ አስማቲሆሙ፡ ለነግሥተ፡ ኢትዮጵያ፡ ወለነገሥተ፡ አክሱም፡ እምቅድመ፡ ልደተ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ብኩሩ፡ ለሰሎሞን፡ ንጉሥ፡ እንበይነ፡ ላኅክም፡ ወልደ፡ ለማኪዳ፡ ንግሥተ፡ አክሱም፡ ወእምድኅሬሁ፡ ብእሲ፡ አንጋቦ፡
msItem.colophon: ተጽሕፈት፡ ዛቲ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ በ፶ወ፩፡ ዓመተ፡ ምኅረት፡ በመዋዕለ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ ለበእደ፡ ማርያም፡ ንጉሥ፡ ወአጽሐፋ፡ Bǝlen Sagadaብሌን፡ ሰገደ፡ አቃፀነ፡ ሰሩዌ፡ ትኵኖ፡ መርሐ፡ ለመንግሥተ፡ ሰማያት፡ ምስለ፡ ውሉዱ፡ ወብእሲቱ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም። Edited and translated in FrenchNotice sur les manuscrits éthiopiens de la Collection d’AbbadieExtrait du Journal AsiatiqueCarloConti RossiniParisImprimerie nationale1914Extrait du Journal Asiatique47. The colophon mentions the year 51 according to the Era of Grace (=CE 1475/76), King Baʾǝda Māryām I, and the commissioner Bǝlen Sagad ʾaqāḍan of Sarāye.

collation.note: The structure of some quires is not well discernable.
collation.signatures: Undecorated but rubricated quire marks are written in the inner corner of the upper margin, on the first and last pages of the quire.

handNote.seg: Black, red; gold according to Le psautier illustré de Belēn SägädImagines Medievales. Studier i medeltida ikonografi, arkitektur, skulptur, måleri och konstverkActa Universitatis Upsaliensis. Ars SueticaEwaBalicka-WitakowskaRudolfZeitlerJan O.KarlssonUppsalaUppsala University Press1983Acta Universitatis Upsaliensis. Ars Suetica71-467.
A lot of rubricated words throughout the text.
handNote.desc: Careful, somewhat regular; by a good scribe. One text column, , could be written by a different scribe.

decoNote.desc: Coptic Cross.
Annunciation, with a rubricated legend.
The Three Magi, with a rubricated legend.
Nativity of Jesus, with a rubricated legend>.
Baptism of Jesus, with a rubricated legend.
The Marriage at Cana, with a rubricated legend.
Jesus Christ, St Mary and the Apostles blessing the wine, with a rubricated legend.
Entry into Jerusalem, with a rubricated legend.
Entry into Jerusalem, with a rubricated legend.
Washing of the Feet, with a rubricated legend.
Jesus arrested and led on rope by two soldiers, possibly Jesus before Pilate, with a rubricated legend.
Crucifixion of Jesus, with a rubricated legend.
Resurrection of Jesus, with a rubricated legend.
Ascension of Jesus, with a rubricated legend.
David Playing the Harp, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental frame.
Fine text dividers after each Psalm.
Apostles Portrait Peter and Paul, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
the Apostles, Andrew and Philip, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
Apostles Portrait Bartholomew and Thomas, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
the apostles, Matthew and Thaddeus, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
the apostles, James and John, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
the Apostles, Matthew and PRS6751Mark, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
the Apostles, Nathaniel and James, son of Alphaeus, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
St George of Lydda, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
Equestrian Saint Theodore killing a dragon, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
Saints Antony and Macarius of Egypt, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
A portrait of Bǝlen Sagad, ʾaqāḍan of Saruwe, a son of Bagada Ṣǝyon, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
A fine ornamental band.
Shenute of Atripe and Bǝsoy, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
A fine ornamental band.
Moses Receiving Law, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
David Playing the Harp, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
King Constantine of Rome, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
Jesus appearing to John the Baptist, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
Virgin and Child, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.
St Mary, with a rubricated legend.
A fine ornamental band.

item.q: ጸሐፍነ፡ በዘንዜክር፡ ተዝካረ፡ ነቢያት፡ ወሐዋርያት፡ ዝክረ፡ ጻድቃን፡ ወሰማዕት። ደናግል፡ ወመነኮሳት፡ ጳጳሳት፡ ቀሳውስት፡ ወዲያቆናት። ሠረቀ፡ መስከረም፡ አመ፡ ፩፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ወበርቶሎሜዎስ፡ ወራጉኤል።
item.note: The list of feasts is written probably in the main Hand 1, or in a hand similar to it. The list ends on 8 Maggābit.

item.desc: A short list of individuals and numbers (register of tributes?)
item.note: Written probably in the main Hand 1.

item.desc: There is a ዝየ-ligature at the beginning of each group of ca. 12 lines.
Each psalm is followed by a sichometrical indication, the rubricated word ቃሉ፡followed by a number.

item.note: An erased note, mostly unreadable, including a string of personal names.

item.desc: Cues for the rubricator, on these and some other folia.

item.note: Multiple exercises in drawing ornamental bands, scribbles and/or writing exercises.

history.origin: The manuscript was commissioned by Bǝlen Sagad, ʾaqāḍan of Sarāye, and completed in the year 51 according to the Era of Grace (=1475/76 CE), according to , which seems to be 1475/76 CE (cp. La chronologie des temps chrétiens de l'Égypte et de l'ÉthiopieMariusChaîneParisLibraire orientaliste Paul Geuthner1925https://archive.org/details/lachronologiedes0000chan/page/n5/mode/2up163) and the eighth year of the reign of Baʾǝda Māryām I. Elsewhere the date is interpreted as 1476/77 CE (Sur la date du Ms. éthiopien d'Abbadie 105Le Monde OrientalJohannesKolmodin1916163-164). According to Conti Rossini, Tanśǝʾa Krǝstos mentioned in supplications on some folia (e.g. ) might have been the scribe who copied the text.
history.provenance: The manuscript was bought by Antoine d'Abbadie sometime between 1840 and 1848.
history.acquisition: The manuscript entered Bibliothèque nationale de France in 1902.

bibl.title: Notice sur les manuscrits éthiopiens de la Collection d’Abbadie
Extrait du Journal Asiatique
Catalogue des manuscrits éthiopiens de la Collection Antoine d’Abbadie
Catalogue raisonné de manuscrits éthiopiens appartenant à Antoine d’Abbadie
Le psautier illustré de Belēn Sägäd
Imagines Medievales. Studier i medeltida ikonografi, arkitektur, skulptur, måleri och konstverk
Acta Universitatis Upsaliensis. Ars Suetica
Un psautier éthiopien illustré inconnu

Orientalia Suecana<hi rend="italics">, 33–35 (= T. Kronholm and E. Riad, in collaboration with L. Carlsson, S. Eliasson, and L. Grönberg, eds, </hi>On the Dignity of Man: Oriental and Classical Studies in Honour of Frithiof Rundgren)
Un codice illustrato eritreo del secolo XV (Ms. Abb. n. 105 della Bibl. Nat. di Parigi)
Africa Italiana
Constructing Kingship in Early Solomonic Ethiopia: The David and Solomon Portraits in the Juel-Jensen Psalter
The Art Bulletin
Sur la date du Ms. éthiopien d'Abbadie 105
Le Monde Oriental

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)
